description_long: This is a rounded ceramic cup with a matte white exterior, shaped to resemble a stylized skull. The front features large, black, hollow-looking eyes and a stitched, grinning mouth, reminiscent of Jack Skellington from The Nightmare Before Christmas. The handle is thick, smoothly curved, and painted black, contrasting with the white body. The back of the cup is plain, with no facial features or decorations. The surface appears smooth and hard, typical of glazed ceramic, and the interior is likely hollow for holding liquids. The cup is visually striking and would stand out in an urban setting, especially in themed cafes or as a decorative item.
description: A white, skull-shaped ceramic cup with a black handle and bold facial features, including large eyes and a stitched mouth. The design is smooth, hard, and visually distinctive.
description_view_0: Front view shows the skull face with large black eyes and a stitched mouth, and the black handle is visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle centered, showing part of the stitched mouth and one eye at the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, rounded back of the cup and the full black handle.
description_view_3: Angled side view reveals the edge of the face, part of the stitched mouth, and the smooth, undecorated back.
